 def cleanup_distributed():

@@ -106,20 +106,42 @@
         dist.destroy_process_group()

 

 

-def compute_iou(pred, target, num_classes=150, ignore_index=255):

-    mask = target != ignore_index

-    pred = pred[mask]

-    target = target[mask]

+@torch.no_grad()

+def evaluate(model, dataloader, device, num_classes=150, ignore_index=255):

+    model.eval()

+    intersection = torch.zeros(num_classes, device=device)

+    union = torch.zeros(num_classes, device=device)

+    target_sum = torch.zeros(num_classes, device=device)

+

+    for imgs, masks in dataloader:

+        imgs = imgs.to(device, non_blocking=True)

+        masks = masks.to(device, non_blocking=True)

+        with autocast():

+            logits = model(imgs)

+            if isinstance(logits, (list, tuple)):

+                logits = logits[0]

+        preds = logits.argmax(dim=1)

+

+        for cls in range(num_classes):

+            pred_cls = preds == cls

+            target_cls = masks == cls

+            valid = masks != ignore_index

+            intersection[cls] += (pred_cls & target_cls & valid).sum().item()

+            union[cls] += ((pred_cls | target_cls) & valid).sum().item()

+            target_sum[cls] += (target_cls & valid).sum().item()

+

+    if dist.is_initialized():

+        dist.all_reduce(intersection, op=dist.ReduceOp.SUM)

+        dist.all_reduce(union, op=dist.ReduceOp.SUM)

+        dist.all_reduce(target_sum, op=dist.ReduceOp.SUM)

+

     ious = []

     for cls in range(num_classes):

-        pred_cls = pred == cls

-        target_cls = target == cls

-        intersection = np.logical_and(pred_cls, target_cls).sum()

-        union = np.logical_or(pred_cls, target_cls).sum()

-        if target_cls.sum() == 0:

-            continue

-        ious.append(intersection / (union + 1e-10))

-    return np.mean(ious) if ious else 0.0

+        if union[cls] > 0:

+            ious.append((intersection[cls] / (union[cls] + 1e-10)).item())

+

+    model.train()

+    return float(np.mean(ious)) if ious else 0.0
